name: field-messaging
description: Field's brand, messaging, and positioning work — a Field Brand Strategist agent for messaging framework development and content extraction, a Brand Voice skill for generating and reviewing content in Field's voice, a Voice Enforcement skill with anti-AI tells, a banned-phrases list, a 33-pattern before/after library, and a draft-audit-final rewrite loop, and a weekly Monday brief for Bill's brand-launch tasks. Available to all Field team members.
